name: Sparkles
summary: A particle background component using tsParticles that creates floating sparkle particles with customizable appearance and behavior.
detailedDescription: Sparkles Core implements a sophisticated particle system using the tsParticles library to create floating sparkle effects. The component initializes the particles engine with the slim package for optimized bundle size, then renders a Particles component with extensive configuration options. Particles are configured with customizable size ranges (minSize to maxSize), speed, color, and density. The system supports click interactions to push particles and hover interactions for repulsion behavior. Particles have bounce physics with configurable horizontal and vertical values, collision detection settings, and opacity animations. The component uses Framer Motion to fade in the particle container once initialization completes, creating a smooth entrance effect. Background color is configurable, with a default deep blue. The particle system runs at 120 FPS for smooth animation and automatically handles window resizing. This creates a magical, atmospheric background suitable for hero sections, feature highlights, or any context where floating particles add visual enchantment without overwhelming the primary content.
purpose: Generate animated particle backgrounds with sparkle effects
Add magical atmosphere to hero and feature sections
Provide interactive particle responses to user input
behavior: Initializes tsParticles engine with configurable options
Animates particles with customizable speed and size variation
Responds to clicks by pushing particles away
Fades in particle container after initialization
visualCharacteristics: Floating particles with varying sizes and opacity
recommendations: Best for premium landing page sections and hero compositions.
Use as a supporting atmospheric layer rather than the primary layout structure.
